subcodes.title: Words to Roy Wilhelm et al, spoken on 1907-04-23
subcodes.first_line: Since the beginning of the world up to the present time, whenever a Manifestation or a Holy One appeared, all stood against Him, disgracefully treated Him, rejected and opposed Him
subcodes.subjects: @scarcity of receptive souls, @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul
